programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma and Karen look for a suitable gift to send their twin town in Japan; Wanda attempts to become the advice giving bartender.

programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.desc: When the BAU is called to negotiate a situation at a federal bank, one of their own becomes a hostage; Prentiss says goodbye.

programme.title: Rule of 3
programme.desc: Alison's world is turned upside down when her husband Dominick dies in a car accident. When it's revealed that he was murdered, even more secrets about his life come to light. It soon becomes clear that Alison was not the only one mourning Dominick, and that his death was only the beginning of a larger plan.

programme.title: East Harbour Heroes
programme.desc: Historic sea ice brings the harbors to a standstill as the heroes fight to keep the island running, while making sure everyone is safe.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned following the final round of the PGA Tour signature event in Miami. The field must survive the daunting par-4 18th hole at Trump National Doral to secure the prestigious title and claim a lucrative multimillion-dollar payout.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen prepares an eyewitness testimony; Hank tries becoming a rodeo clown.

programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Battle of the Generations
programme.desc: Four contestants from different generations; Baby Boomer, Gen X, Millennial, and Gen Z face-off through multiple rounds of pop culture trivia.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Abby decides to remain in L.A. and has designs on one of the loftmates; Winston avoids checking his LAPD entrance exam results.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar is asked to be a school bus driver for the day; the kids may not be the only ones who need a lesson in good behavior.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets a new member of his extended family; Karen helps Wanda showcase her math skills; Ruby makes menu changes.

programme.title: The Wolverine
programme.desc: Lured to a Japan he hasn't seen since World War II, century-old mutant Wolverine (Hugh Jackman) finds himself in a shadowy realm of yakuza and samurai. Wolverine is pushed to his physical and emotional brink when he is forced to go on the run with a powerful industrialist's daughter (Tao Okamoto) and is confronted -- for the first time -- with the prospect of death. As he struggles to rediscover the hero within himself, he must grapple with powerful foes and the ghosts of his own haunted past.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma causes tension at the elementary school after a teacher leaves her in charge.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants; passengers win money by answering trivia questions.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.sub-title: etalk All Access: "The Devil Wears Prada 2"

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The cooks must cater an exclusive art gallery event, and the losers bake to save their lives.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.
